name: ZPHS, Anandhapuram
welcomeMessage: Welcome to ZPHS Anandhapuram — a centre of excellence where every child's potential is nurtured with care, dedication, and quality education.
address: ZPHS Anandhapuram, Anandhapuram Village, Vizianagaram District, Andhra Pradesh - 535280

principal.name: Sri. K. Venkateswara Rao
principal.title: Headmaster
principal.message: It is my privilege to welcome you to ZPHS Anandhapuram. Our school stands as a beacon of quality education in the Vizianagaram district. We are committed to providing holistic education that goes beyond textbooks — nurturing curiosity, creativity, and character in every student. Our dedicated teachers work tirelessly to ensure that every child, regardless of background, receives the best education possible. I invite you to explore our school and become a part of our growing family.
